title: 'Arsenal have been trying to nick 1-0 wins' - do they need mindset change?
summary: Arsenal and Manchester City are level on points and goal difference with five games remaining in the Premier League season, intensifying the title race down the stretch. The focus on 1-0 wins suggests Arsenal may need to adjust their tactical approach for the crucial final matches.
content: Arsenal and Manchester City are locked on points and goal difference heading into the final five games of the Premier League season.

zh.title: "阿森纳一直在争取1-0胜利"——他们需要改变心态吗？
zh.summary: 阿森纳和曼彻斯特城在英超还剩5场比赛时积分相同、净胜球也相等，激化了冠军争夺的最后冲刺。对1-0胜利的关注表明阿森纳可能需要为关键的最后几场比赛调整战术策略。

title: Late Reds boss Beard inducted into WSL Hall of Fame
summary: Former Liverpool Women manager Matt Beard has been posthumously inducted into the Women's Super League Hall of Fame alongside Casey Stoney and Kerys Harrop. The honor recognizes their significant contributions to women's football in England.
content: Former Liverpool manager Matt Beard is posthumously inducted into the Women's Super League Hall of Fame, along with Casey Stoney and Kerys Harrop.

zh.title: 已故利物浦女足主帅比尔德入选女超名人堂
zh.summary: 利物浦女子足球队前主教练马特·比尔德与凯西·斯通和凯里斯·哈罗普一同被追授入选女超联赛名人堂。这一荣誉认可了他们对英格兰女足的杰出贡献。

title: How the Irish Premiership can be won on the final day
summary: The Irish Premiership title race remains competitive with Larne, Coleraine, and Glentoran all in contention for the Gibson Cup heading into the final day. Multiple scenarios could determine the championship winner on the decisive final match.
content: With Larne, Coleraine and Glentoran still in the hunt for the Irish Premiership title heading into the final day, BBC Sport NI takes a look at what needs to happen to decide the destination of the Gibson Cup.

zh.title: 爱尔兰超级联赛如何在最后一天决出冠军
zh.summary: 爱尔兰超级联赛冠军争夺依然竞争激烈，拉尼、科莱雷恩和格伦托兰都在争夺吉布森杯，即将迎来最后一天的竞争。多种场景可能在这场决定性的比赛中决出冠军。

title: From blank sheet to double promotion -  the best pals reviving Nuneaton
summary: Nuneaton Town, established in 2024, has achieved back-to-back promotions in the 2025-26 season under co-managers Darren Acton and Russell Dodd, lifelong friends. Their partnership demonstrates how strong personal relationships can drive sporting success.
content: Nuneaton Town, formed in 2024, won their second consecutive promotion in 2025-26 under lifelong friends Darren Acton and Russell Dodd, who spoke to BBC Sport about the friendship behind their success.

zh.title: 从零开始到双级升级 - 挚友联手复兴纽内顿
zh.summary: 纽内顿镇成立于2024年，在共同主教练达伦·阿克顿和罗素·多德（终身挚友）的带领下，在2025-26赛季实现了连续升级。他们的合作展示了牢固的个人关系如何能推动体育成功。

title: 'Can't do both' - O'Neill rules out extending NI-Blackburn job share
summary: Michael O'Neill has decided against continuing his dual role as Northern Ireland head coach and Blackburn Rovers manager, acknowledging he underestimated the workload. Having guided Blackburn to Championship safety, he concluded the positions are incompatible long-term.
content: Michael O'Neill admits he "underestimated" the demands of juggling head coach duties at Northern Ireland and Blackburn Rovers after steering the club to safety in the Championship.

zh.title: "无法同时兼顾" - 奥尼尔排除延长北爱尔兰与布莱克本双重职位的可能性
zh.summary: 迈克尔·奥尼尔已决定不继续担任北爱尔兰国家队主教练和布莱克本流浪者队经理的双重角色，他承认自己低估了工作量。在将布莱克本引至英冠保级后，他得出结论这两个职位长期不兼容。

title: Blackburn legend Parkes dies aged 76
summary: Tony Parkes, a legendary Blackburn Rovers player and coach, has passed away at age 76. He was a significant figure in the club's storied history.
content: Former Blackburn Rovers player and coach Tony Parkes has died, aged 76.

zh.title: 布莱克本传奇帕克斯去世，享年76岁
zh.summary: 传奇性的布莱克本流浪者队球员兼教练托尼·帕克斯已去世，享年76岁。他是该俱乐部悠久历史中的重要人物。

title: Coventry owner not worried by Lampard links with Chelsea
summary: Coventry City owner Doug King has dismissed concerns about Frank Lampard's potential move to Chelsea, expressing confidence in the manager's commitment. King outlined the club's plans for the upcoming season amid speculation about Lampard's future.
content: Doug King tells BBC CWR about plans for next season and why Frank Lampard is happy at Coventry.

zh.title: 考文垂老板对兰帕德切尔西传闻不感担忧
zh.summary: 考文垂城队老板道格·金对弗兰克·兰帕德可能转投切尔西的担忧表示不屑，并表达了对这位经理承诺的信心。金在外界对兰帕德未来的猜测中阐述了俱乐部新赛季的计划。

title: Celtic's most decorated player Forrest signs on for 18th season
summary: James Forrest has agreed to a new contract extension with Celtic, securing his continued tenure as the club's most decorated player into an 18th season. The deal underscores his enduring importance to the Scottish champions.
content: James Forrest agrees a new deal at Celtic, keeping the club's most decorated player on until the end of next season.

zh.title: 凯尔特人荣誉最多的球员福雷斯特签署第18赛季合约
zh.summary: 詹姆斯·福雷斯特与凯尔特人队签署了新的合约延期，确保了这位球队荣誉最多的球员继续效力苏格兰冠军队第18个赛季。该协议突显了他对苏格兰冠军的持久重要性。

title: No Fifa plans for Iran-Italy swap at World Cup despite Trump envoy's suggestion
summary: FIFA has reaffirmed that Iran will participate in the 2026 World Cup, contradicting speculation about a potential team swap involving Italy. President Gianni Infantino confirmed the Iranian team's participation despite recent comments from a Trump envoy.
content: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".

zh.title: 尽管特朗普特使建议，国际足联对世界杯伊朗-意大利互换无计划
zh.summary: 国际足联已重申伊朗将参加2026年世界杯，与关于可能涉及意大利的球队互换的推测相矛盾。主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺确认了伊朗队的参赛资格，尽管特朗普特使最近发表了评论。

title: Foxes' demise 'sad to see' says title-winning captain Morgan
summary: Wes Morgan, who captained Leicester City to their historic 2016 Premier League title, expressed sadness over the club's recent drop to League One. The decline represents a dramatic fall for the franchise a decade after their remarkable championship season.
content: Wes Morgan is "sad and hurt" to see Leicester drop into League One a decade after winning the Premier League.

zh.title: 前英超冠军队长摩根：看到狐狸队衰落"令人伤心"
zh.summary: 曾在2016年带领莱斯特城创造历史地赢得英超冠军的威斯·摩根表达了对俱乐部最近降级英乙的伤心。这个衰落代表了这支球队在创造奇迹赛季十年后的戏剧性陨落。

title: When are the 2026-27 Premier League fixtures released?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team addresses when the 2026-27 Premier League fixture schedule will be released. The article provides clarity on the timing of next season's match calendar.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains when the fixtures for the 2026-27 Premier League season are released.

zh.title: 2026-27赛季英超赛程何时发布？
zh.summary: BBC体育的"有问必答"团队回答了2026-27赛季英超赛程何时将发布。这篇文章说明了下赛季比赛日历发布的时间。

title: How to follow the FA Cup semi-finals on the BBC
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team outlines how audiences can watch, listen to, and follow the FA Cup semi-finals across BBC platforms. The guide helps viewers understand all available coverage options.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explain how you can watch, listen and follow the FA Cup semi-finals.

zh.title: 如何在BBC上观看足总杯半决赛
zh.summary: BBC体育的"有问必答"团队介绍了观众如何在各个BBC平台上观看、收听和关注足总杯半决赛。该指南帮助观众了解所有可用的转播选项。

title: Ipswich Women take big step towards safety
summary: Ipswich Women have defeated Sheffield United under interim manager David Wright, boosting their chances of avoiding relegation. The victory marks a significant step toward securing safety in their playoff push.
content: Interim boss David Wright hails the improvement by Ipswich Women after they beat Sheffield United to boost their hopes of avoiding relegation.

zh.title: 伊普斯维奇女队朝安全迈出重要一步
zh.summary: 伊普斯维奇女队在临时主教练大卫·赖特的带领下击败谢菲尔德联队，增强了避免降级的机会。这场胜利标志着在争夺季后赛安全方面迈出了重要一步。

title: Podcast: Tavernier departure & play-off battle heats up
summary: James Tavernier has announced his departure from Rangers as the club enters a critical playoff battle. The move comes as Rangers face intense competition in the upcoming playoff stage.
content: James Tavernier announces his Rangers exit and are clubs ready for the play-off battle?

zh.title: 播客：塔维尼埃离队与季后赛争夺升温
zh.summary: 詹姆斯·塔维尼埃宣布离开流浪者队，该队正面临关键的季后赛争夺。此举发生在流浪者队在即将到来的季后赛阶段面临激烈竞争的时刻。

title: Rangers linked with defender Batista - gossip
summary: Rangers have been credited with interest in a Portuguese-based defender and are pursuing a permanent deal for a loan player from a relegated Premier League club. The club is actively strengthening its defensive options.
content: Rangers credited with interest in Portuguese-based defender and a permanent deal for loan player from relegated Premier League side...

zh.title: 流浪者队与后卫巴蒂斯塔有转会传闻
zh.summary: 流浪者队被报道对一位葡萄牙籍后卫感兴趣，并正在追求从降级英超球队租借球员的永久交易。该俱乐部正在积极加强其防线配置。

title: Captain Salah one last time? FPL team of the week
summary: Mohamed Salah remains a top Fantasy Premier League pick despite six teams having blank fixtures this week, with analysts favoring the Liverpool captain for continued goal contributions. The recommendation underscores Salah's enduring reliability in FPL despite occasional fixture challenges.
content: With six teams blanking this week, it is a time to look to an old FPL hero and put your faith in Mohamed Salah to score for a fourth-straight start.

zh.title: 队长萨拉赫最后一次？英超梦幻足球周最佳阵容
zh.summary: 尽管本周有六支球队有空闲轮次，穆罕默德·萨拉赫仍然是英超梦幻足球的顶级选择，分析师看好利物浦队长继续贡献进球。这一建议强调了萨拉赫在梦幻足球中的持久可靠性，尽管偶尔会面临赛程挑战。
